params.name: Battle of San Romano
params.description:
On Jun 24, 1455 AD, Uccello first attempted to create the Battle of San Romano.
The Battle of San Romano is a panel painting created by the Italian artist Uccello. In order to create the perfect painting, he created three versions of the Battle of San Romano, all on wooden panels. In the center of the painting is Niccolò da Mauruzi, the commander of the Florentine army, who is directing soldiers in battle. Behind him is a flag bearer on horseback, and behind the flag bearer are soldiers of di …
